instructions.message: Monitor TikTok comments, sentiment, and engagement for @ianmadrid_

developments.message: Initial TikTok monitor component created with sentiment analysis
Removed mock data - now shows honest empty state with API configuration instructions

insights.message: Requires TikTok Business API (1-2 week approval) or third-party service (Pentos, Analisa.io ~$50-200/mo)
Browser automation workflow available as free alternative - use managed browser + cron

brainstorming.message: Could use browser-based scraping via managed browser for basic stats without API
